name: 24" x 34" Wood Arch Decorative Wall Mirror Natural - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Stained Finish, No Assembly Required
description: Proving with panache that function follows form, this Wood Arch Decorative Wall Mirror from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee adds sleek flair to your home. Featuring a classic arch shape, this mirror features a natural wooden frame to suit your kind of aesthetics. Suitable for a variety of spaces — from bathroom to entryway and more — this framed wall mirror complements all your decor styles while adding decorative charm to the space.
